tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Introduction: [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]A#m[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]D#m[/ch]


[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
With her wine-stained lips, yeah she’s nothing but trouble[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]

[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
I gave all my heart but she won't heal my soul[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
She tasted a break and I can’t get more[/tab]

[tab]                   [ch]G#[/ch]                    [ch]D#m[/ch]
